name: claws
description: Turn every VS Code terminal into a programmable endpoint. List, create, send, execute, read, and close terminals from any external process via a local socket.

scripts.test: npm run typecheck && npm run build && npm run test:smoke && npm run test:native && npm run test:config && npm run test:capture-store && npm run test:oversized && npm run test:pty-lifecycle

claws.socketPath.description: Relative path (from workspace root) for the Unix socket. Default: .claws/claws.sock

claws.logDirectory.description: Relative path for wrapped terminal pty logs. Default: .claws/terminals

claws.defaultWrapped.description: Create all new terminals as wrapped (with pty logging) by default.

claws.maxOutputBytes.description: Maximum bytes of output buffered per command event (256KB default).

claws.maxHistory.description: Maximum command events retained in the ring buffer.

claws.maxCaptureBytes.description: Maximum per-terminal output captured in the in-memory ring buffer for wrapped Pseudoterminal terminals (1 MB default).

claws.execTimeoutMs.description: Default timeout for an `exec` command before the server rejects with timeout (milliseconds, 180s default). Individual requests may override via `timeoutMs` in the request payload.

claws.pollLimit.description: Maximum number of history events returned by a single `poll` request. Responses exceeding this are truncated to the most-recent `limit` entries and include `truncated: true`.

claws.enableWebSocket.description: [Planned] Enable WebSocket server for cross-device access.
